next_steps: Serum vitamin B12, methylmalonic acid, and homocysteine levels
Flow cytometry of peripheral blood for PNH clone (CD55/CD59 expression)
Bone marrow aspirate and biopsy with cytogenetics and flow cytometry
Serum ferritin, triglycerides, and soluble CD25 (IL-2 receptor) to screen for HLH
Peripheral blood smear review by a hematopathologist
Lactate dehydrogenase, haptoglobin, and reticulocyte count to characterize hemolysis
Comprehensive hemolytic panel (reticulocyte count, haptoglobin, indirect bilirubin, LDH, direct antiglobulin test/DAT)
Flow cytometry for PNH clone (CD55 and CD59 expression on neutrophils and monocytes)
Bone marrow aspirate and biopsy with cytogenetics, flow cytometry, and iron staining
Serum ferritin, fasting triglycerides, and soluble CD25 levels to evaluate for HLH
Peripheral blood smear for manual review by a hematopathologist specifically searching for intracellular organisms and morphological dysplasia
Serum B12, methylmalonic acid, homocysteine, and folate levels
